metadata.subject: Corporate Law II
metadata.institution: National Law School of India University, Bengaluru

topic_sequence.title: Introduction to Insolvency Law
cases:
Introduction to IBC

topic_sequence.title: Initiating CIRP & Default vs. Dispute
sessions_covered: Initiation of Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process [§§6,7,8,9 and 10]
Concept of ‘default’ and ‘existence of a dispute’
cases: Swiss Ribbons v Union of India
Vidharbha Industries v Axis Bank

Capital Limited v Sach Marketing
Mobilox Innovations Private Limited v Kirusa Software Private Limited
Macquarie Bank Limited v Shilpi Cable Technologies Limited

cases: Vallal RCK v Siva Industries
